ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the account that owns the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "daily_budget" REAL /* Daily budget limit for the campaign */,
  "bid_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for bidding (e.g., Maximize Clicks, Target CPA) */,
  "conversion_tracking" INTEGER /* Whether conversion tracking is enabled for the campaign */,
  "conversion_actions" TEXT /* Specific conversion actions tracked (e.g., form submissions, purchases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the account */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was last updated */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., standard, premium) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_groups" (
  "ad_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad group */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the campaign to which the ad group belongs */,
  "ad_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad group */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ad group (e.g., active, paused) */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Default bid amount for the ad group */,
  "targeting_criteria" TEXT /* Additional targeting criteria (e.g., age, location) */,
  "conversion_optimizer" INTEGER /* Whether conversion optimizer is enabled for the ad group */,
  "conversion_goal" TEXT /* Specific conversion goal for the ad group (e.g., lead generation, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_groups_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad */,
  "ad_group_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the ad group to which the ad belongs */,
  "ad_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ad (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "creative_url" TEXT /* URL of the ad creative */,
  "destination_url" TEXT /* URL where the ad leads */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of ad (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "ad_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the ad (e.g., approved, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_ad_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_group_id") REFERENCES ad_groups ("ad_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the ad to which the keyword belongs */,
  "keyword_text" TEXT /* Text of the keyword */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Match type of the keyword (e.g., Broad, Exact) */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Bid amount for the keyword */,
  "top_vs_other" TEXT /* Whether the keyword is targeted for top placement or other */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the keyword based on past performance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the keyword (e.g., active, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the ad being measured */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance measurements */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device used */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Computer, Smartphone) */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network through which the ad was delivered */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the user */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks received */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Total impressions delivered */,
  "spend" REAL /* Amount spent on the ad */,
  "conversion_count" INTEGER /* Number of conversions */,
  "conversion_value" REAL /* Total value of conversions */,
  "cost_per_conversion" REAL /* Cost per conversion */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate (CTR) */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the ad */,
  "average_position" REAL /* Average position of the ad in search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_device_os FOREIGN KEY ("device_os") REFERENCES devices ("device_os"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_network FOREIGN KEY ("network") REFERENCES networks ("network_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Computer, Smartphone) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "screen_size" TEXT /* Screen size of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network (e.g., Bing and Yahoo! search) */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., search, display) */,
  "reach" TEXT /* Estimated reach of the network */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketing manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
